# PHIL.085 ? Deontology

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** contemporary
**Subcategory:** deontology
**Domain:** CONTEMPORARY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Duty-based ethics; categorical imperative; respect for persons; rule-following; moral law; backward-looking justification

## Application
Follow moral duties; treat persons as ends; universal rules; moral law; respect autonomy; duty over consequences

## Key Values
- Duty
- Moral law
- Respect for persons
- Universal rules

philosophy, contemporary, deontology
